title: HEFTMAN Glass Drink Dispenser with Tap - 2 x 4 Litre Mason Jar Drink Dispenser with Leakproof Tap & Metal Wire Stand - Drinks Dispenser, Cocktails, Empty Beverage Dispenser
features: STYLISH WATER DISPENSER STAND - The accompanying metal wire drink dispenser stand not only provides stability but also introduces a modern and trendy aesthetic to your tabletop or beverage station. Elevating the 2 x beverage dispenser to a convenient height, it makes it easy to fill glasses without any hassle. The stand’s durable construction ensures long-lasting use, making it a practical and stylish addition to any event setup.

LEAK-PROOF DESIGN - Bid farewell to messy spills with the water dispensers plastic tap that boasts a leak-proof design, offering peace of mind during parties or gatherings. The spigot of this glass drinks dispenser ensures leak-proof and drip-free operation, while a tin metal lid safeguards your beverages from bugs and debris.

VERSATILE MASON JAR DRINKS DISPENSER - From lemonade to fruit juices, cocktails to soft drinks, this juice dispenser with tap is ideal for home hosting, parties, weddings, and restaurant buffets. Its versatility makes it a must-have for any occasion, adding a touch of elegance to your serving setup. This glass jar with tap also works well as a fabric conditioner dispenser.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS - Crafted from BPA-free materials, this glass water dispenser with tap 2 pack is odour, flavour, and stain-resistant, guaranteeing the purity of your beverages. The crystal-clear walls provide a stunning view of the contents, while the authentic mason jar with tap design adds a charming aesthetic to any setting.

CONVENIENT & STYLISH - With its easy-to-clean design and wide opening, this glass drink dispenser with tap offers a hassle-free solution for serving your favourite beverages in style. Simply hand wash, or pop in the dishwasher after use, ready to be used again and again. Please Note: Do not clean with boiling water, or use this cold water dispenser for any hot drinks.
description: Product Description Leak-Free The spigot of this glass drinks dispenser ensures leak-proof and drip-free operation, while a tin metal lid safeguards your beverages from bugs and debris. Versatile From lemonade to fruit juices, cocktails to soft drinks, this juice dispenser with tap is ideal for home hosting, parties, weddings, and restaurant buffets. Sturdy Wire Stand Elevating the beverage dispensers to a convenient height, the wire stand makes it easy to fill glasses without any hassle, whilst providing stability. HEFTMAN Glass Drink Dispenser with Tap - 2 x 4 Litre Mason Jar Drink Dispenser Say goodbye to messy spills with the glass drinks dispenser with tap's leak-proof plastic tap, providing peace of mind during any gathering or party. Crafted from premium BPA-free materials, this glass dispenser with tap is resistant to odours, flavours, and stains, ensuring the purity of your beverages with every pour. The crystal-clear walls grant you a grand view of the goodness inside, while the wide-mouth mason jar drink dispenser design adds a majestic touch to any setting; also allowing for easy refills. Versatile and convenient, it's perfect for serving a variety of beverages; use it as a soft drink dispenser, a squash dispenser, or even a cocktail dispenser with tap. With such a vast array of options, this lemonade dispenser is ideal for home hosting, parties, weddings, and restaurant buffets. With its easy-to-clean design and durable construction, this glass beverage dispenser is a must-have addition to any beverage service setup, providing an elegant and hassle-free solution for all your hosting needs. The stylish metal wire stand not only adds stability but also elevates the dispensers to a convenient height, making it easier to fill glasses while adding a modern and trendy aesthetic to your beverage station.
